query: What Con Edison commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Manhattan based on OpenEI tariffs data?
final_answer:
Based on my analysis of the OpenEI IURDB tariff data for Con Edison (EIA ID 4226) commercial tariffs in Manhattan (Zone J), here is the answer:

## **SC-8 — Multiple Dwellings Redistribution Low Tension Service — Zone J [NYC]**

This service class has the **highest demand charge** of any Con Edison commercial tariff in Manhattan.

### Demand Charge Details

| Season | Base Rate ($/kW) | Adjustment ($/kW) | **Total ($/kW)** |
|--------|------------------|--------------------|-------------------|
| **Winter** (Oct–May) | $53.85 | $14.69 | **$68.54** |
| Summer (Jun–Sep) | $41.56 | $14.69 | $56.25 |

The adjustment of $14.69/kW includes Dynamic Load Management Adjustment + EV Make Ready + Value of Distributed Energy Resources + Market Supply Charge + Arrears Management.
